creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Created attachment 251176
pin caddy-custom version

Hi,

Here is my proposal:

* change -V to -v to allow full expansion (unlikely an issue but safer)
* omit PORTREVISION from CADDDY_VERSION to be able to use it verbatim for the build command
* pin the build to the same version as www/caddy (via Monviech)

The reason for the PORTREVISION omission is that nothing really ties www/caddy-custom to www/caddy and it can't take patches from there or other build things.

Maybe what could be considered is making caddy-custom a flavour of www/caddy which could make this much cleaner and traceable? If that's something you're interested in we can try to propose a patch for this as well.


Cheers,
Franco
